quoted_tweet.text:
Joe Mazzulla:

“Too many times it’s all about winning... You have to surrender to the idea that when you’re going after that, you’re going to fail. We failed by not winning, but we stick to the process of being able to do that. That’s just the duality of how things work. It’s not an either-or thing. It’s both and, you feel both of those things.”

(h/t @SMHighlights1)

kept.text:
Elektronik biraz şans işi ama ben o şansı kendi adıma biraz garantiye alıyorum. Evdeki televizyondan buzdolabına, çamaşır makinesinden kurutma makinesine kadar her ana demirbaşımda akım korumalı priz takılı.

https://t.co/wbkIRosP1I
https://t.co/uz1aXHUptw

Bugün en basit beyaz eşyayı bile yerine koymak en az 20-30 bin TL. Faydasını gördün mü? derseniz priz takılı olan hiçbir cihazımda bugüne kadar elektrik kesintisi kaynaklı sorun yaşamadım. Ama ihmal edip takmadığım masaüstü bilgisayarımda maalesef arıza durumuyla karşılaştım. 

Ben zamanında Philips almıştım ama şu an Brennenstuhl marka ürün hem yorum hem fiyat olarak çok daha mantıklı duruyor. İhtiyacı olup değerlendirmek isteyenler ürünleri kontrol edebilir.

İşbirliği

kept.text:
@fandompulse WTF is she going on about? Games ARE power fantasies. 

Does she think that every dude playing games can just fly spaceships, beat up martial arts masters, and fight giant monsters in their daily lives? 

That’s the whole damn point of video games — and really any other form of entertainment media.

Of course customers want something that caters to them. The last decade has shown the industry what happens when studios DON’T cater to customers’ wants. That’s not “entitlement.” That’s called basic business.

The studios that make shit no one wants, but somehow feel they deserve our money and praise are the ones with “entitlement” issues.

This grifter caused serious damage to this industry and every developer that has been laid off and is still out of work can thank her for that.

kept.text:
$AMZN の場合、

営業CFは +260億ドル儲かってる
 ↓
しかし設備投資が -442億ドルもある 
↓
そのためFCFは -182億ドルの赤字 
↓ 
さらにCapEx以外の投資活動も含めると、投資CF全体は -642億ドルもある 
↓ 
これを財務CF +528億ドル、つまり借入・社債発行などの資金調達で埋めている 
↓ 
結果として、現金等はむしろ増えている
